about.title: About Clinic Queue
about.subtitle: Our mission is to modernize healthcare management across the Arab world

meta.title: About — Clinic Queue
meta.description: Learn about Clinic Queue's story and our vision to improve clinic and patient experiences.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: We strive to empower every clinic — large or small — to deliver a seamless waiting experience for patients and high efficiency for medical teams.

story.title: Our Story
story.body: We started from a simple observation: most clinics struggle with waiting room chaos. So we built a simple system to solve this problem with modern technology.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Clear pricing and honest data at every step.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We continuously evolve to meet the needs of modern clinics.

care.title: Care
care.desc: We put the doctor and patient experience at the heart of every decision.

how.step3Desc: Shows ticket numbers live to patients in the waiting room

pricing.starterDesc: For new clinics just getting started

pricing.enterpriseDesc: For clinic chains and large practices

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1Q: How do I start using the system?
faq.q1A: Sign up, register your clinic details, and you can start managing patients immediately after admin approval — usually within 24 hours.
faq.q2A: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We use row-level security so each clinic can only ever access its own data.
faq.q3A: Absolutely. You can add multiple team members with different roles — reception staff or doctors — each with scoped access.
faq.q4A: Cash, card, and bank transfer — all tracked separately with per-method totals in the daily report.
faq.q5A: Yes, we offer support via email and WhatsApp during business hours, plus full documentation.

cta.headline: Ready to transform your clinic?
cta.subtext: Join hundreds of clinics already running on Clinic Queue

footer.tagline: Smart queue management for modern clinics

featuresPage.heroSubtitle: Every tool you need to run a smooth, modern clinic
featuresPage.queueDesc: Manage patient flow in real time with automatic ticket assignment, live status updates, and a dedicated display screen for the waiting room.
featuresPage.queueP1: Automatic ticket numbering for new and follow-up visits
featuresPage.queueP2: Live queue status visible to reception and doctor simultaneously
featuresPage.queueP3: One-click call-next from the doctor's dashboard
featuresPage.billingDesc: Track every payment, discount, and outstanding balance without leaving the registration screen.
featuresPage.billingP1: Supports cash, card, and bank transfer
featuresPage.billingP3: Discount tracking and payment status per visit
featuresPage.doctorDesc: Everything the doctor needs in one focused view — from vital signs to final diagnosis.
featuresPage.doctorP1: Vital signs: weight, height, BP, pulse, temperature, blood sugar
featuresPage.doctorP3: Full patient medical history at a glance
featuresPage.displayDesc: A dedicated full-screen view for the waiting room, showing ticket numbers with live animations.
featuresPage.displayP2: Dark animated theme visible across the room
featuresPage.profilesDesc: A complete medical record for every patient, shared securely across clinics.
featuresPage.profilesP1: Chronic diseases, allergies, and current medications
featuresPage.multiDesc: Manage multiple clinic branches from a single admin account.
featuresPage.multiP1: Each clinic has its own isolated data and team
featuresPage.multiP2: Centralized admin dashboard across all clinics
featuresPage.adminDesc: Platform-level oversight with full analytics, approvals, and audit logs.
featuresPage.adminP2: Revenue and visit charts across all clinics
featuresPage.adminP3: Full audit log of every data change
featuresPage.auditDesc: Every action is logged and traceable. Your data never leaves our secure infrastructure.
featuresPage.auditP2: Full audit trail: who changed what, when
featuresPage.auditP3: End-to-end encryption in transit and at rest
featuresPage.metaDesc: Explore all features: queue management, billing, doctor dashboard, patient profiles, multi-clinic support, and more.

pricingPage.heroSubtitle: Straightforward plans that grow with your clinic
pricingPage.faqA1: The Starter plan is permanently free. Professional includes a 14-day free trial.
pricingPage.faqA2: Yes, upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect on your next billing cycle.
pricingPage.faqA3: All prices are in Egyptian Pounds (EGP).
pricingPage.faqA4: No setup fees ever. Pay only the monthly subscription.
pricingPage.metaDesc: Simple, transparent pricing for clinic queue management. Free plan available.

about.heroSubtitle: We are building the operating system for Egyptian clinics
about.missionText: To eliminate the chaos of paper-based queues and disconnected billing systems in Egyptian clinics — giving doctors more time to care and patients a better experience.
about.storyText: Clinic Queue started as a simple Flask app built to solve a real problem in a single clinic. After seeing how much time was wasted on manual queues and hand-written billing, we rebuilt it as a modern SaaS platform that any clinic in Egypt can adopt in minutes.
about.value1Desc: Every feature is designed to reduce clicks, not add them.
about.value2Desc: Full Arabic support, EGP billing, and local clinic workflows.
about.value3Desc: Row-level security and encryption protect every record.
about.value4Desc: We ship updates based on real clinic feedback every week.
about.teamSubtitle: A small team with a big focus on clinic operations
about.metaDesc: Learn about Clinic Queue — our mission, story, and values.

contact.heroSubtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out any time.
